name: GoCD
description: GoCD — OSS continuous delivery server from ThoughtWorks with pipeline visualization and value stream mapping.

seo.title: GoCD — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: GoCD: GoCD — OSS continuous delivery server from ThoughtWorks with pipeline visualization and value stream mapping.

when_to_use: Pipeline-as-code with value stream map visualization
Continuous delivery server with approval gates
Fan-in/fan-out pipeline dependencies for complex flows
Open-source CD alternative to Jenkins with modern UI

pros: Value stream mapping visualizes complex pipelines
cons: UI and concepts feel dated vs GitHub Actions
You run and upgrade the server and agents
review.verdict: Powerful for modeling complex delivery pipelines, but hard to justify over modern hosted CI.
review.best_for: Enterprises modeling long, branching delivery pipelines with strict stage gating.
review.not_for: Small teams wanting a fast, hosted, low-maintenance CI setup.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free/open-source — no commercial pricing, no HWM.
